name: Multi-Domain Research Milestones Timeline
input: Create a timeline showing major research milestones across multiple scientific domains. Section Genomics: 2003 Human Genome Project completed, 2012 ENCODE Project results, 2015 CRISPR first human embryo editing, 2020 COVID-19 genome sequenced in 10 days. Section Neuroscience: 2005 Deep brain stimulation FDA approved, 2013 BRAIN Initiative launched, 2018 First complete connectome of C. elegans, 2023 Brain-computer interface clinical trials. Section Immunology: 2010 First CAR-T therapy trial, 2016 First checkpoint inhibitor combo approved, 2020 mRNA COVID vaccines in record time, 2024 Universal flu vaccine Phase III.
qualityCriteria: Year labels present for each event
Genomics milestones include Human Genome and CRISPR
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Timeline with 3 domain sections, 12+ events spanning 2003-2024, major research milestones.
